summary: Hosted-close rebase merge pre-merge DONE conflict is fixed with commit-bound missing-basis tolerance and focused regression coverage.
findings: Pass: missing pre_merge_closure basis commits are tolerated only when the pre-merge marker is bound to the task DONE commit or an explicit matching PR number, preserving stale PR mismatch rejection.
residual_risks: Local git hook wrappers hung without child checks; direct focused checks and hosted PR checks passed.
